title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A full-stack personal portfolio built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and a Node.js/Express backend. Showcases skills, projects, and provides a working contact form.

title: Project Two
description: A full-stack event calendar app for creating, editing, and deleting events in a month-view calendar. Built with a Node.js/Express backend and REST API, with a vanilla JavaScript frontend that updates the calendar in real time.
